markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align content strategy with the Superhuman rebrand and Q4 growth goals.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Paused:** Content strategy is on hold pending a decision from Harmony (Morgan's manager) on whether to focus on Superhuman Mail or the new product bundle.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Production Resumed:** GrowthX is resuming content production (10 posts) to reverse flat traffic and help Superhuman hit its Q4 seat targets, which are currently behind pace.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**New Tracking Needed:** The Looker dashboard will be updated to track blog-driven signups directly, a critical metric for optimizing Q4 performance.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [**Competitor Focus:** Scrunch tracking will be updated to focus on key competitors like Fixer AI, which Superhuman views as a major threat despite its low visibility in current reports.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)

## Topics

### Q4 Growth & Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Superhuman is behind on Q4 seat targets, making content production a top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Content strategy is paused pending a decision from Harmony on the primary focus:](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Superhuman Mail:** The current product.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Product Bundle:** The new "AI Native productivity suite."](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Superhuman lacks a smooth upgrade path for existing Mail users to the bundle.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**Risk:** Churning to re-sign up for the bundle causes data loss (e.g., shared snippets, comments).](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [**Goal:** Prevent churn and guide users to an official upgrade path when it's built.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Interim Plan:** GrowthX will continue refreshing existing Superhuman Mail content while awaiting a decision.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)

### Content Performance & Optimization

  - [**Traffic:** Blog traffic was flat from September to October, a direct result of the content production pause.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** ChatGPT is the primary LLM traffic source.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Refreshing "stat posts" (e.g., "time management stats") is a low-effort way to capture high-intent LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [**Content Pillars:** GrowthX will consolidate the current content clusters (e.g., merging "AI & Automation" and "Workflow Automation") into 5–6 clear pillars for better performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [**Tone of Voice:** The recent "Becoming Superhuman" post was a one-off announcement. The standard tone remains conversational but more formal.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Competitor & Conversion Tracking

  - [**Competitor Tracking:** Scrunch tracking will be updated to reflect Superhuman's internal competitive focus.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current Scrunch report shows low visibility for Fixer AI, a competitor Superhuman considers a major threat.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
      - [**Action:** Morgan will provide updated competitor positioning to refine the list of tracked prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking:** The Looker dashboard will be updated to track signups directly.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a critical metric for optimizing blog performance against Q4 seat targets.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Action:** Jo will investigate the technical setup, which may involve stitching data from the `blog.superhuman.com` subdomain with the main site's GA4 instance.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Morgan:**](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Get clarity from Harmony on the Q4 content strategy (Mail vs. Bundle).](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Provide updated competitor positioning for Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [Investigate Looker dashboard setup for signup conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [Share a brief Scrunch report in two weeks to validate data.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Resume content production (10 posts) for publication by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Continue refreshing existing Superhuman Mail content.](https://fathom.video/share/eWjNFWxfxEbP1Ts7adUDCxtuHGA7unw7?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
